domain: IT Consulting, SAP Implementation, Staffing & Training

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-200/50 shadow-sm
surface_strategies.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-slate-200), transition-all hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1
surface_strategies.hero_overlay: Gradient overlay for text contrast: bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-900/80 via-slate-900/40 to-transparent
surface_strategies.buttons: Solid: bg-[#1ab69e] text-white hover:bg-[#149380] font-semibold. Outline: border-2 border-[#1ab69e] text-[#1ab69e] hover:bg-[#f0fdfa]

motion_and_interactions.global: Lenis for smooth scrolling. (npm install lenis)
motion_and_interactions.scroll_reveal: Framer Motion: initial opacity-0 translate-y-8, whileInView opacity-100 translate-y-0, viewport once
motion_and_interactions.stagger: Lists and bento grids must stagger children on entrance

marketing.strategy: Custom pure HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts. Avoid Shadcn Cards for creative sections to maintain high-end flexibility.
marketing.hero: Parallax image background with Framer Motion scroll transforms. Left-aligned bold typography. Tagline prominent.
marketing.services_grid: Bento Grid (Mode A: The Tetris Grid) combining squares, talls, and hero spans. Avoid generic 3-column bootstrap layout.
marketing.marquee: React Fast Marquee for 'Our Clients/Partners' - slow, smooth, monochrome logos.

interactive.strategy: Shadcn UI heavily customized to match the brand.
interactive.forms: Shadcn Form, Input, Textarea for Contact Us and Admin Login.
interactive.navigation: Sticky header (Crystal Glass) with clear navigation links on desktop, Shadcn Sheet for mobile.
interactive.tabs: Use Shadcn Tabs for switching between SAP Implementation, Staffing, and Training if displayed in a single section, or separate pages depending on routing.

hero_image.description: Modern glass office building against blue sky. Use in Hero section with parallax and dark gradient overlay for text readability.

sap_implementation.description: Abstract blue/teal digital data network. Use in SAP Implementation section.

sap_staffing.description: Diverse business team collaborating. Use in SAP Staffing & Resourcing section.

sap_training.description: Person focused on computer screen. Use in SAP Training section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and setup 'lucide-react' for icons, 'framer-motion' for animations, 'react-fast-marquee' for scrolling elements, and 'lenis' for smooth scrolling.
Configure tailwind.config.js to use Cabinet Grotesk for sans (or custom heading font) and Satoshi for body, and extend the colors with the provided teal (#1ab69e) palette.
Build a 5-tab navigation: Introduction/Contact, SAP Implementation, SAP Staffing & Resourcing, SAP Training, Blogs.
Implement a Parallax Hero Section using the provided hero_image URL and Framer Motion.
Create a clean Bento grid layout for the services (SAP Implementation, Staffing, Training) emphasizing the #1ab69e accent color.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button').

For the Blog CMS with Admin Panel, build the frontend routes and forms, mock the backend data if no DB is provided, but ensure the UI flow (Admin Login -> Dashboard -> Manage Blogs) is fully designed.
Follow the High-Contrast Swiss Archetype: Keep layouts asymmetric, use generous negative space (e.g., py-24, gap-12), and avoid center-aligning everything.
Use the provided image URLs exclusively. Do not use placeholder services like via.placeholder.com.
